Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

About
SBI Large & Midcap Fund Direct Plan Growth
SBI Large & Midcap Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by SBI Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 29 Jun 1987. Pradeep Kesavan is the Current Fund Manager of SBI Large & Midcap Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹12,71,425 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹715.30.
The SBI Large & Midcap Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000. Exit load of 0.10% if redeemed within 30 days.
;
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks to provide the investor with the opportunity of long-term capital appreciation by investing in diversified portfolio comprising predominantly large cap and mid cap companies.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

SBI Healthcare Opportunities Fund Direct Plan Growth
SBI Healthcare Opportunities Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by SBI Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 29 Jun 1987. Pradeep Kesavan is the Current Fund Manager of SBI Healthcare Opportunities Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹12,71,425 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹577.24.
The SBI Healthcare Opportunities Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000. Exit load of 0.50% if redeemed within 15 days

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

About
SBI Small Cap Fund Direct Growth
SBI Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by SBI Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 29 Jun 1987. Pradeep Kesavan is the Current Fund Manager of SBI Small Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹12,71,425 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹208.15.
The SBI Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500.  Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
;
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks to provide investors with opportunities for long-term growth in capital along with the liquidity of an open-ended scheme by investing predominantly in a well diversified basket of equity stocks of small cap companies.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

About
SBI Gold Direct Plan Growth
SBI Gold Direct Plan Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by SBI Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 29 Jun 1987. Viral Chhadva is the Current Fund Manager of SBI Gold Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹12,71,425 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹43.21.
The SBI Gold Direct Plan Growth is rated High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹5,000. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 15 days.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

Tax implication

About
HDFC Multi Cap Fund Direct Growth
HDFC Multi Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Amar Kalkundrikar is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Multi Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,44,244 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹19.94.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

About
HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth
HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,44,244 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹44.07.
The HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth is rated High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.

The Scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Gold Exchange Traded Fund.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.

About
HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth
HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Rahul Baijal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,44,244 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 13 Jul 2026 is ₹1,237.04.
The HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
;

The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Large-Cap companies.

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
Tax
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.
